pages.title: Partition of Unity Radial Basis Function interpolation parameters

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.help: Allow to overwrite file if already exists.

parameters.name: areas
parameters.help: KML file containing the areas that will be interpolated

parameters.name: query_block_size
parameters.help: Apply the interpolant using maximum this number of points at a time to avoid large memory consumption.

parameters.name: rbf_epsilon
parameters.help: Epsilon parameter of the RBF. Please check each RBF documentation for its meaning. Required just for the following RBF types: gaussian, multiquadric, regularized, tension, wendland

parameters.name: rbf_regularization
parameters.help: Regularization scalar to use while creating the RBF interpolant (optional)

parameters.name: rbf_polynomial_degree
parameters.help: Degree of the global polynomial fit used in the RBF formulation. Valid: -1 (no polynomial fit), 0 (constant), 1 (linear), 2 (quadric), 3 (cubic)

parameters.name: pu_overlap
parameters.help: Overlap factor between circles in neighboring sub-domains in the partition. The radius of a QuadTree cell, computed as half its diagonal, is enlarged by this factor

parameters.name: pu_min_point_in_cell
parameters.help: Minimum number of points in a QuadTree cell

parameters.name: pu_min_cell_size_percent
parameters.help: Minimum cell size, specified as a percentage [0..1] of the max(width, height) of the query domain

parameters.name: pu_overlap_increment
parameters.help: If, after creating the QuadTree, a cell contains less than pu_min_point_in_cell, the radius will be iteratively incremented until this condition is satisfied. This parameter specifies how much the radius of a cell increments at each iteration

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.help: Verbosity flag, activate it to have feedback of the current steps of the process in the command line.

parameters.name: show
parameters.help: Show interpolation problem and results on screen.
